short_desc: Made buying our first home so much less stressful
review_text: The guides on this site explained everything in plain English. As first-time buyers we had no idea where to start - the step-by-step buying guide was invaluable and the mortgage calculator helped us work out exactly what we could afford.

short_desc: Used the site for our house move after 10 years
review_text: We hadn't moved in a decade and everything had changed. The moving checklist and change-of-address guide saved us so much time. We'd definitely recommend this to anyone moving home.

I use this site regularly when researching buy-to-let properties. The calculators are particularly useful - the rental yield calculator helped me quickly assess whether a property stacked up financially.

short_desc: Helped us price and sell our property
review_text: We used the property valuation guide before choosing an estate agent and it gave us much more confidence in the process. We ended up getting a higher offer than expected.
I always found mortgages confusing but the guide on this site broke it all down clearly. The fixed vs tracker comparison was especially helpful when deciding what to apply for.
Conveyancing felt like a black box to me. After reading the guide here I knew exactly what was happening at each stage and could ask my solicitor informed questions.
